strengths: Strong domain fit with concrete cooperative/credit-union specifics (NCUA, routing #, SEGs, shared branching)
Clear recurring motif: concentric rounded membership-card frames used structurally across testimonials, rate cards, branch tiles
Seven well-differentiated pages with distinct layout patterns (split-view locator, calculator-led borrow page, editorial Money Garden, timeline Belong)
Highly concrete interactions: loan calc with credit-tier slider + amortization sparkline, pin-bar account comparison, eligibility quick-check, lock-my-card from utility bar
Content model fields are realistic (lobby wait, life-stage tag, leaf-count difficulty meter, scholarship recipient)
Voice and copy specifics ('Your money. Your neighbors. Your call.', 'Front Porch Mortgage') avoid generic templating
weaknesses: Money Garden + Belong + home blog teaser slightly overlap in editorial function
Some patterns (sticky compare bar, ZIP-search locator) are conventional fintech moves rather than surprising
'Bank · Borrow · Belong' alliteration risks feeling marketing-deck rather than institutional

strengths: Distinctive almanac/broadsheet aesthetic with ledger stripes, Roman-numeral chapter markers, and monospace figures is genuinely fresh and far from generic credit-union template output
Governance-and-voting page is a sharp differentiator that leans into the cooperative seed and few competitors execute (board ballot, annual meeting RSVP, Rochdale Principles, member proposals)
Calculator 'workshop' as a 2×3 engraved-tool grid with print-to-PDF is a concrete, layout-specific idea, not a vague widget
River-basin grouping of branches ties brand name (Three Rivers) into the locator's information architecture — motif-driven IA, not just decoration
Content model is unusually rich (board candidate statements, annual report PDFs by year with total assets, marginalia footnotes, Loans-at-Work profiles)
Engraved scratchboard motif + horizontal ledger banding is a unified, page-spanning visual system that justifies the 'warm community institutional' brief in a non-cliched way
Seven pages, each with a distinct layout pattern and purpose; no near-duplicates
weaknesses: Risk that monospace figures + engraved illustrations skew cold/archival rather than warm — tension with seed's 'warm' palette intent
Marginalia and broadsheet two-column may be heavy at mobile breakpoints despite the stated reflow plan
Member-authenticated ballot is ambitious for a marketing-site concept and may bleed into authenticated-app scope
